title: Necromancer returns linked Limited Summon when effect is negated

card.rawText: During your turn, you may summon 1 creature from your cemetery as a Limited Summon (MAX-1). Return the summoned creature to your cemetery if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Necromancer returns linked Limited Summon when effect is negated
plan.summary: Start with a Necromancer-linked Limited Summon on the field, invalidate Necromancer's effect, and verify the linked Limited Summon returns to the cemetery.

notes: Place Necromancer on player_1 field as primary.
Start with a creature Limited Summoned by and anchored to Necromancer.
Resolve this as source/effect invalidation, matching effects such as Mind Sap negating Necromancer's creature effect.

steps: Return linked Limited Summon(s) to cemetery.
Inspect player_1 field creatures and cemetery.
manualVerification: Confirm the same cleanup is called when Necromancer leaves the field or changes control.
riskNotes: This validates source/effect invalidation cleanup for Necromancer's linked Limited Summon.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Necromancer linked Limited Summon cleanup.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
